hero.intro: I design and ship production systems end to end — Angular in the browser, Spring Boot on the server, Docker everywhere in between.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a full stack developer based in Ingolstadt, Germany, currently building backend services and Angular frontends at Donat IT. My home turf is Angular on the frontend and Java, Spring Boot and Quarkus on the backend, but I care most about the seams: API contracts, data models, deployments, and the moments where frontend and backend have to agree.
about.bio2: Over nearly a decade — from Accenture in Malaysia, to Wipro in Bangalore, to Donat IT in Germany — I've worked across automotive, manufacturing, finance and energy, shipping everything from tax and accrual portals to microservices-based automotive platforms on AWS.
about.philosophy1: Boring technology, exciting products. Choose proven tools so the creativity budget goes into the product.
about.philosophy2: Types are documentation that can't lie. From SQL schema to TypeScript interface.
about.philosophy3: Every feature ships with its tests, its metrics and its rollback plan.
achievements: Led the migration of a monolithic application to microservices at Donat IT, improving system performance by 40%
Mentored engineering teams on Angular architecture and scalable frontend practices at Wipro
Delivered enterprise portals and automation systems for global clients, including Petronas, at Accenture
